name: get_views
description: List views in the workspace. Views define how records are displayed, filtered, and sorted.

name: get_view_query_parameters
description: Get filter and sort parameters from a view. Use these parameters with find_* tools to query records matching the view.

name: get_view_filters
description: List all filters applied to a view. Each filter defines a condition that records must match to appear in the view.

name: get_view_sorts
description: List all sorts applied to a view. Each sort defines a field and direction that determines the order records appear in the view.

name: create_view
description: Create a new view for an object. Views define how records are displayed. For KANBAN views, mainGroupByFieldName is required and must be a SELECT field (e.g., "stage", "status"). For CALENDAR views, calendarFieldName and calendarLayout are required.

name: update_view
description: Update an existing view. You can change the name and icon.

name: delete_view
description: Delete a view by its ID.

name: create_view_filter
description: Add a filter to a view. Use list_object_metadata_items to get fieldMetadataId values.

name: create_many_view_filters
description: Add multiple filters to a view in one call. Use list_object_metadata_items to get fieldMetadataId values.

name: update_view_filter
description: Update a filter on a view. Use get_view_filters to find the filter ID.

name: delete_view_filter
description: Remove a filter from a view. Use get_view_filters to find the filter ID.

name: create_view_sort
description: Add a sort to a view. Use list_object_metadata_items to get fieldMetadataId values.

name: create_many_view_sorts
description: Add multiple sorts to a view in one call. Use list_object_metadata_items to get fieldMetadataId values.

name: update_view_sort
description: Update a sort on a view. Use get_view_sorts to find the sort ID.

name: delete_view_sort
description: Remove a sort from a view. Use get_view_sorts to find the sort ID.
